instruction.objective: Ship inPACT Lesson 5: merge draft content into the lesson skeleton, verify UI rules, and commit.
instruction.context: Lesson 5 is 'Impact Audit'. Draft is at drafts/lesson_5_impact_audit.md. Skeleton is at apps/inpact/content/lessons/5.md and uses shared ls-* classes from apps/inpact/css/shared.css.
constraints: No em dashes anywhere in lesson text
success_criteria: Merged lesson renders at :3006/lessons/5 without console errors
Em dash scan returns zero matches
Commit is on main with conventional feat(inpact) prefix
failure_criteria: Any em dash present in final output

environment.infrastructure_context: apps/inpact runs on :3006 via launch.json; delta-kernel on :3001 is running
